detailed_description.heading: Compact Wireless Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik SXTsq Lite2 stands as a testament to cost-effective, high-performance outdoor wireless networking. Designed to facilitate long-distance wireless communication, the SXTsq Lite2 excels in connecting locations separated by geographical obstacles, utilizing directional antennas to focus signals and maximize throughput.

Operating on the 802.11b/g/n standards, the SXTsq Lite2 supports a wide compatibility range with various devices, offering increased data transmission speeds and improved network reliability. Including MIMO technology under the 802.11n standard further enhances its capability, providing better range and signal stability. This makes the device particularly effective for applications requiring high-speed data transmission, such as streaming high-definition video, online gaming, and supporting Wi-Fi hotspots in public areas. The 300Mbps 2.4GHz radio rate ensures extensive coverage and high-speed data transmission, ideal for environments where penetrating walls and other barriers is necessary.

detailed_description.heading: Antenna Design for Optimal Range
detailed_description.text: The SXTsq Lite2, while positioned as an affordable option, incorporates a 10 dBi directional antenna, significantly enhancing its design for superior wireless performance. This antenna's 10 dBi gain—a measure of signal strength improvement over an isotropic radiator—focuses the device's signal in a specific direction. Such directionality not only amplifies the signal's reach and strength in targeted areas but also markedly extends the wireless signal range. This makes the SXTsq Lite2 particularly adept at long-distance point-to-point communication, without necessitating additional power, thereby ensuring reliable connectivity over extended distances.

Moreover, the optimized transmission achieved by the 10 dBi antenna minimizes interference from undesired directions, improving both signal quality and reliability. This feature renders the SXTsq Lite2 an ideal choice for a variety of applications, from establishing robust outdoor wireless networks connecting distant points—be it between buildings on a campus or in bridging internet access to remote locations—to supporting surveillance systems and telecommunications infrastructure, especially in areas where clear, strong links are essential. The redesign of the SXTsq Lite2 has also led to a significant reduction in physical size, making the device two times thinner than its predecessor, the SXT Lite2.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Connectivity Solutions
detailed_description.text: This device is engineered to address a diverse array of networking needs across various scenarios, making it an invaluable asset in both urban and remote settings. Its adeptness at establishing Point-to-Point (PtP) links makes it perfect for creating direct wireless connections between two locations, eliminating the need for impractical cabling over distances. As Customer Premises Equipment (CPE), it excels, connecting end-users to wider Internet service provider networks with ease and reliability, especially in settings where it's mounted externally to capture the strongest signal. For outdoor Wi-Fi coverage, this device shines by offering extended connectivity to parks, venues, and rural areas, bringing internet access where traditional methods fall short.

In the realm of security, it serves as a robust backhaul for video surveillance systems, ensuring steady and reliable transmission of critical surveillance footage from remote locations to central monitoring stations. Its utility extends to providing emergency internet access in situations demanding rapid deployment, such as events, disaster recovery, or temporary construction sites, ensuring continuity of communication when it's needed most. Furthermore, its capability for network bridging showcases its flexibility, seamlessly connecting separate network segments and expanding network reach without the physical constraints of wiring. Across these applications, the device stands out for its adaptability, performance, and ease of deployment, catering to a wide spectrum of networking challenges.

detailed_description.heading: Efficient Processing
detailed_description.text: The SXTsq Lite2, powered by the Qualcomm Atheros QCA9533 chipset, combines cost-efficiency and operational efficacy in small-scale, outdoor wireless networking devices. This device integrates a single-core processor clocked at 650 MHz, complemented by 64 MB of RAM, to deliver efficient performance tailored for basic networking and communication tasks. Such a configuration ensures smooth performance for networking functions and basic multitasking, aligning with the requirements of most small-scale network applications without necessitating intensive data processing capabilities.

Despite its compact form, the SXTsq Lite2 does not falter in performance, standing out as an optimal solution for small-scale outdoor setups where space and power may be limited. The inclusion of a single 10/100 Mbit Ethernet port underscores its capability to provide stable connectivity options for wired devices and internet uplink. This port is adept at handling various applications ranging from internet browsing and email to streaming standard definition content, although it's worth noting the potential limitations for high-bandwidth activities such as HD video streaming.

detailed_description.heading: Lightning Protection & Mounting Options
detailed_description.text: The SXTsq Lite2 is engineered with a focus on safety and durability, integrating advanced protection against lightning strikes through a robust grounding connection. This essential safety feature channels electrical surges directly into the earth, safeguarding the device from potential damage and ensuring the sustained operation and reliability of your outdoor wireless network, even in environments prone to electrical fluctuations and lightning incidents.

Constructed to withstand the rigours of outdoor deployment, the SXTsq Lite2's weatherproof enclosure effectively shields its internal components from rain, dust, and extreme temperature variations. This protective housing not only extends the device's lifespan but also maintains network integrity in varying environmental conditions. Additionally, the enclosure is designed with versatility in mind, incorporating slots for hose clamp mounting. This system offers three distinct mounting options, providing unparalleled flexibility for installation on poles, masts, or other structures. The hose clamp mount ensures a secure fit, adaptable to different diameters, and guarantees stability against high winds and adverse weather, facilitating optimal device positioning and hassle-free setup in a diverse range of outdoor settings.

comments.name: Jānis
comments.text: A great device for its price

comments.name: Steve
comments.text:
Really nice little device, used to connect to an AP a few hundred meters away.
Personally I do not like the pass-through clamp fixings, as this makes it difficult to fix to a wall for example.
I bought the extra Noise shield as this once screwed to the SXT adds two bolts that can be used to fix it to a wall bracket.

bought_together.name: Mini Wall Mount Bracket Ø38mm L110
